title: Venue
doc_html:
§1449.  Venue

Venue in suits in a parish court shall be determined in the same manner as venue in suits brought in the district court.  

Added by Acts 1979, No. 328, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1980.
doc_text:
§1449.  Venue
Venue in suits in a parish court shall be determined in the same manner as venue in suits brought in the district court.
Added by Acts 1979, No. 328, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1980.
